title: ricinella sylvestris
intro: Ricinella sylvestris, also known as the wild sage or European sage, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, grayish-green leaves and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Ricinella sylvestris lie in its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cognitive function. Ricinella sylvestris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
